mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teacher_score_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT * FROM teacher_score_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_score_record (student_id, defense_group_id, teacher_id, year, item1_score, item2_score, item3_score, item4_score, item5_score, item6_score, total_score, submit_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{defenseGroupId}, #{teacherId}, #{year}, #{item1Score}, #{item2Score}, #{item3Score}, #{item4Score}, #{item5Score}, #{item6Score}, #{totalScore}, #{submitTime})
